policy.maintenance_note: Daily source-watch reads this document after checking active SOURCE-LOCK pins. If a source-watch PR recommends action, update recommendation, action_taken, and remaining_work in a separate human-reviewed PR. Remove a target once it is fully implemented and normal SOURCE-LOCK daily source-watch owns future upstream tracking, or once it is no longer relevant.

targets.name: Open Knowledge Format draft spec
targets.recommendation: Review draft spec changes only; do not copy spec text or change toolkit docs from the daily source-watch PR.
targets.action_taken: No toolkit implementation has been accepted yet.
targets.remaining_work: Decide whether any reviewed concept should become first-party toolkit documentation. If accepted, open a separate implementation PR and then either move future upstream tracking into SOURCE-LOCK or remove this advisory target.
targets.removal_condition: Remove after accepted OKF-derived toolkit work is implemented and any ongoing upstream dependency is represented by SOURCE-LOCK daily source-watch, or after deciding no action is needed.

targets.name: Ponytail decision ladder patterns
targets.recommendation: Review concepts only; do not vendor hooks, plugins, dependencies, or upstream code from the daily source-watch PR.
targets.action_taken: No toolkit implementation has been accepted yet.
targets.remaining_work: Decide whether any reviewed decision-ladder concept belongs in toolkit planning or review guidance. If accepted, open a separate implementation PR and then either move future upstream tracking into SOURCE-LOCK or remove this advisory target.
targets.removal_condition: Remove after accepted Ponytail-inspired toolkit work is implemented and any ongoing upstream dependency is represented by SOURCE-LOCK daily source-watch, or after deciding no action is needed.

targets.name: Host Harness Capability Drift Review
evidence_sources: Claude Code memory and rules docs: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/memory
targets.recommendation: Run the template on cadence. Keep safety rules unless official host behavior demonstrably covers the same risk; propose shrink, move, host-native migration, or deletion only in a separate evidence-backed PR.
targets.action_taken: Review lane added. No toolkit component has been changed by source-watch.
targets.remaining_work: Perform the next cadence review using the template. If no meaningful drift is found, update last_reviewed_at and this status record only. If meaningful drift is found, open a separate PR with evidence, rationale, exact proposed modifications, and validation.
targets.removal_condition: Remove only if supported host harnesses stop changing relevant native capabilities or another maintained source-watch lane fully owns this review.
